bbs_synchronized.command.players_only: Only players can use this command.
bbs_synchronized.command.not_installed: BBS Synchronized isn't installed on your client, so models can't be synchronized.
bbs_synchronized.broadcast.uploaded: %s uploaded %s model file(s). Use %s to receive them.
bbs_synchronized.sync.in_progress: A synchronization is already in progress...
bbs_synchronized.sync.timeout: Model download timed out — you can retry with /bbs model reload.
bbs_synchronized.sync.verify_failed: Failed to verify "%s" — it was discarded.
bbs_synchronized.upload.skipped: Skipped "%s" — it already exists on the server with different contents.
bbs_synchronized.upload.nothing: No new models to upload — the server already has all of your model files.
